The analysis in the previous section shows that 3D RMS orbit accu-
racy of the hybrid LNAV/PPP-B2b ephemeris improves by 9.05%
compared to the broadcast ephemeris, and the hybrid clock offset with
CDT achieves a 40.7% improvement relative to that without CDT. This
section verifies the improvement effect of the hybrid LNAV/PPP-B2b
orbits and clock offset on LEO reduced-dynamic orbit. Notably, the
